empty_arg_probe.reason: write.entity.attribute requires blockref_handle/handle for owning AcDbBlockReference
aligned dim needs xline1, xline2, dim_line points
angular2line dim needs xline1_start/end, xline2_start/end, arc_point
angular3pt dim needs center, xline1, xline2, arc_point
arc dim needs center, xline1, xline2, arc_point
radiallarge dim needs center, chord_point, override_center, jog_point

empty_arg_probe.reason: rotated dim needs xline1, xline2, dim_line points

leader needs vertices/points array with >=2 {x,y,z} points
mleader needs vertices/points array with >=2 {x,y,z} points
write.entity.polygonmesh requires m_size>=2,n_size>=2 and points length == m_size*n_size
